f=1 local g g=function(l)local n,p local t={}local function u(v,w)t[w]=v;return t[w]end local v={}v[1]=0 v[2]=3 v[3]=1 local v=-38512 repeat if v<=-38512 then n=0 p=0 for w=0,3 do local x=e(l,f)n=r(n,s(x,8*w));f=f+1;end;for w=0,3 do local l=e(l,f)p=r(p,s(l,8*w));f=f+1;end;v=t[v+70590]or u(89756,v+70590)else if v==27463 then break else return p*4294967296+n;end end until v==27463 end;local l l=function(n)local p local t={}local function u(v,w)t[w]=v;return t[w]end local v={}v[1]=2 v[2]=3 v[3]=2 local v=51905 repeat if v>=51905 then if v~=70588 then p=0 for w=0,3 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*w));f=f+1;end;v=t[v+93246]or u(70588,v+93246)else return p;end else break end until v==-20577 end;local l l=function(n)local p local t={}local function u(v,w)t[w]=v;return t[w]end local v={}v[1]=2 v[2]=3 v[3]=2 local v=60963 repeat if v>=-25801 then if v~=60963 then return p;else p=0 for w=0,2 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*w));f=f+1;end;v=t[v+29544]or u(-25801,v+29544)end else break end until v==-35127 end;local l l=function(n)local p local t={}local function u(v,w)t[w]=v;return t[w]end local v={}v[1]=2 v[2]=4 v[3]=1 local v=-49728 repeat if v>=35758 then if v<56949 then return p;else break end else p=0 for w=0,1 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*w));f=f+1;end;v=t[v+40863]or u(35758,v+40863)end until v==56949 end;local l l=function(n)local p local t={}local function u(v,w)local x=q(w,w)local v=v+x t[w]=v;return v end local v={}v[1]=4 v[2]=0 v[3]=3 local v=29177 repeat if v>=-31677 then if v<29177 then break else p=0 p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8))v=t[q(v,81549)]or u(-32414,q(v,81549))end else f=f+1 return p;end until v==-31677 end;local l l=function(n)local p local r={}local function s(t,u)local v=q(u,u)local t=t+v r[u]=t;return t end local t={}t[1]=2 t[2]=3 t[3]=2 local t=79346 repeat if t>=21225 then if t~=79346 then break else p=0 p=e(n,f)f=f+1 t=r[q(t,53453)]or s(-11240,q(t,53453))end else return p;end until t==21225 end;local n n=function(p)local r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y,z,ba,bb local bc={}local bd={}local function be(bf,bg)bd[bg]=bf;return bd[bg]end local bf={}bf[1]=4 bf[2]=2 bf[3]=1 local bf=-12084 repeat if bf<=-39747 then if bf<-39747 then break else ba=(y%128)*16+h(x/16)bb=((x%16)*2^48+w*2^40+v*2^32+u*2^24+t*2^16+s*2^8+r)bf=bd[bf+61626]or be(-36129,bf+61626)end else if bf>=-32650 then if bf<-12084 then return z*bb*2^(ba-1023-52);else r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y=e(p,f,f+7)f=f+8 bc[2]=y>127 and-1 or 1 z=bc[2]bf=bd[bf+38172]or be(-39747,bf+38172)end else if ba==0 then if bb==0 then return z*0;else return z*bb*2^(-1022-52);end;elseif ba==2047 then if bb==0 then return z*(1/0);else return 0/0;end;end;bb=bb+2^52 bf=bd[bf+75989]or be(-32650,bf+75989)end end until bf==-47561 end;local p p=function(r)local s,t local u={}local function
